name: Iron Range Customs
notes: CMS: DealerCarSearch (DCS) platform (site_id=32047, internal_id=21036, confirmed by imagescdn.dealercarsearch.com asset URLs and site_platform=dcs in Tealium data layer). Feed/API checks: DCS public API endpoints (/apiv2/inventory/search, /Handlers/InventoryHandler.ashx) returned errors; DCS renders additional inventory via JavaScript XHR not accessible via static HTML. Inventory count confirmed at 3 vehicles via pagination check (page 2+ returned 0). Vehicle data extracted from compareChecked() JS callback parameters in static HTML: listing ID, price, image URL, year/make/model, plus i10r_optVin, i10r_optMileage, i10r_optDrive elements.
